info.title: AURA API Gateway Service
info.description: Enterprise self-healing data analytics platform gateway

post.description:
Issue a signed JWT for the given user.

**Note:** This is a development/demo endpoint.  In production, swap
the body for real credential validation (OAuth2 password flow, SSO
callback, etc.).

get.description: Return the claims of the authenticated user.

post.description:
Unified chat endpoint: NL → SQL → Execute → Visualize in one call.

1. Discovers available tables from uploaded files (DuckDB) with smart header detection.
2. Sends rich schema context (columns, types, sample data, relationships) to LLM.
3. Auto-executes the SQL on DuckDB.
4. Returns data + generated SQL + chart suggestion.

schema.title: Response Chat Endpoint Api V1 Chat Post

get.description: Get chat history for a session.

post.description: Save a chat message to session history.

get.description: Get list of supported file formats.

schema.title: Response Get Supported Formats Api V1 Files Supported Formats Get

post.description:
Universal file upload endpoint — accepts both 'file' and 'upload_file' parameter names.

Publishes real-time progress to SSE topic ``upload:{upload_id}``. The client
may provide its own id via the ``X-Upload-Id`` header (recommended so it can
subscribe before POSTing); otherwise one is generated server-side.

get.description: List all uploaded files.

schema.title: Response List Files Api V1 Files Get

get.description: Get information about a specific file.

schema.title: Response Get File Info Api V1 Files  File Id  Get

delete.description: Delete a file and its processed data.

schema.title: Response Delete File Api V1 Files  File Id  Delete

get.description: Fetch stored profile for a file if available.

schema.title: Response Get File Profile Api V1 Files  File Id  Profile Get

get.description: List available data connectors.

post.description: Test connector configuration.
List tables from a connector.
Profile a table from connector.

schema.title: Response Profile Table Api V1 Connectors  Connector Type  Profile Post

get.description: List all registered data source connections.

post.description: Register a new data source connection.
Test an existing connection by ID.

get.description: Get table/column schema for a connection.
Proxy to database service for connection testing.

post.description:
Execute SQL from the chat interface.

• If *connection_id* is provided, proxy to the execution sandbox.
• Otherwise, run against uploaded files via DuckDB.
Execute query with automatic insights generation.
Proxy query generation to orchestration service.

schema.title: Response Generate Query Proxy Api V1 Generate Query Post

post.description: Validate SQL query for safety and performance.
Lint SQL query for style and optimization.
Generate insights from query results.

get.description: Get server-side query history.

post.description: Save a query execution record.

get.description: Real-time dashboard statistics (cached 30 s).

post.description: Approve a pending job for execution.
Cancel a pending or running job.
Preview the schema + first N rows of a source file.
Execute an ETL pipeline: load source → apply transforms → write destination.

get.description: Download a processed ETL output file.

post.description: Use LLM to build transform steps from a natural language instruction.
Convert a natural language prompt into a Pipeline definition.
Execute a pipeline definition and return results.

Kick off pipeline execution in the background and publish live progress.

Returns ``{run_id, topic}``. Subscribe to ``GET /stream/pipeline:{run_id}``
for plan + stage progress + final run result.
Save a pipeline definition for later use.

get.description: List all saved pipelines.
Get a saved pipeline by ID.
Get column schema for a file.
Download a pipeline output file.

post.description: Auto-generate semantic model from dataset profile.

schema.title: Response Auto Generate Model From File Api V1 Semantic Models From File  File Id  Post
Response List Semantic Models Api V1 Semantic Models Get
Response Upsert Semantic Model Api V1 Semantic Models Post
Response Get Semantic Model Api V1 Semantic Models  Model Id  Get

get.description:
Universal SSE endpoint.

Subscribe by navigating to `/stream/<topic>` in an EventSource.

Wildcard subscriptions are supported::

    /stream/monitor:*   — all monitor events
    /stream/*           — every event on the bus

parameters.name: replay

schema.description: Replay all buffered events on connect
schema.title: Replay

parameters.description: Replay all buffered events on connect

get.description:
Return current subscriber counts by topic.
Useful for the admin dashboard to see what the frontend is listening to.

post.description: Public trigger endpoint — POST a JSON body to launch the hook.

schema.title: Response Fire Hook Api V1 Hooks Fire  Slug  Post

post.description: Generate an execution plan without running it.
Plan + execute the full DAG synchronously.  Returns when done.
Plan + execute with real-time SSE progress.

Kick off plan + execute in the background.

Returns ``{session_id, topic}`` immediately. The caller subscribes to
``GET /stream/agent:{session_id}`` to receive live progress/complete/error
events published through the universal streaming bus.

get.description: List all registered agent tools.

get.summary: SSE stream of metrics + window events
Get available source/sink/window/transform schemas for dynamic forms

get.description: Return the current state of the evolution engine.

post.description: Manually trigger an evolution analysis cycle.
Submit agent execution feedback for learning.
Find similar past execution patterns for a given intent.

get.description: List top performing execution patterns.
List improvement proposals.
Get full details of an improvement proposal.

patch.description: Update a proposal's status or test results (e.g. after manual review).

get.description: Return the system evolution audit log.
Aggregate feedback statistics for the past N days.

Poll every microservice and return a unified health report.
Also fetches the latest Hᵤ healing score from UASR.
Quick summary of the self-evolution engine state.

LateDataPolicy.title: LateDataPolicy
LateDataPolicy.description: How to handle events that arrive after the watermark.

StreamSink.title: StreamSink
StreamSink.description: Defines where processed data is emitted.

StreamTransform.title: StreamTransform
StreamTransform.description: One processing operation in the streaming pipeline.

TokenRequest.title: TokenRequest
TokenRequest.description:
Minimal login: user id + optional metadata.

In production this should validate credentials (password, OAuth code,
etc.).  For now it issues a token for the given ``user_id`` so the
rest of the JWT pipeline can be exercised end-to-end.

TransformType.title: TransformType
TransformType.description: Processing operations available in streaming transforms.

WindowType.title: WindowType
WindowType.description: Temporal window strategies for stream aggregation.
